summary: Verified the run-completion lifecycle: removeWorktree is invoked in the finally block of _runSingleFeature (bin/lib/run.mjs:1523) after a successful run, and `git worktree remove --force` removes both the directory and the tracking entry. Added a real-git integration test in test/worktree.test.mjs that creates a worktree via createWorktreeIfNeeded, calls removeWorktree, and asserts the directory is deleted AND `git worktree list` no longer contains the path. Full suite: 543 pass / 0 fail.
